name: Easy Cheesecake (Red Lobster)
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Pillsbury Lorna Doone cookies, crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crushed cookies with butter, sugar, and gelatin until well combined.
2. Spread the mixture evenly over the bottom of a greased 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for exactly 8 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, beat together the cream cheese, sour cream, eggs, butter, cornstarch, sugar, and vanilla until smooth and creamy.
5. Pour the filling into the crust.
6. Return the pan to the oven and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-35 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool on a rack for 20 minutes before releasing the springform pan from the cake.
8. Allow the cheesecake to cool for another 20 minutes before cutting and serving.
9. Sprinkle the top with crushed cookie crumbs before serving.
Source: Gloria Pitzer's Secret Recipes Newsletter
